title: Salty Moroccan Chicken Rfissa
description: A juicy, adventurous Moroccan chicken dish with a salty twist using onion salt, pickled cucumber, and shredded flatbread.

ingredients.name: Onion salt
ingredients.notes: blend 1 tsp onion powder + 1/2 tsp sea salt

ingredients.name: Shredded flatbread
ingredients.notes: pre-cooked couscous is a suitable substitute

instructions: Season the chicken thighs with onion salt, cumin, coriander, and paprika; set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Brown the chicken thighs on all sides until golden, about 5-6 minutes per side; remove and set aside.
In the same pot, add diced carrot, zucchini, and pickled cucumber, sautéing until softened, about 4 minutes.
Return the chicken to the pot, pour in the chicken broth, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
Stir in the cooked chickpeas and shredded flatbread, cooking until the bread absorbs liquid and thickens, about 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed; serve hot with lemon wedges on the side.
